deviceTypes.description: Device types that should match for this survey to be shown.

deviceTypesMatchType.description:
URL/device matching types: 'regex' (matches regex pattern), 'not_regex' (does not match regex pattern), 'exact' (exact string match), 'is_not' (not exact match), 'icontains' (case-insensitive contains), 'not_icontains' (case-insensitive does not contain).

* `regex` - regex
* `not_regex` - not_regex
* `exact` - exact
* `is_not` - is_not
* `icontains` - icontains
* `not_icontains` - not_icontains

repeatedActivation.description: Whether to show the survey every time one of the events is triggered (true), or just once (false).

values.description: Array of event names that trigger the survey.

name.description: Event name that triggers the survey.

linkedFlagVariant.description: The variant of the feature flag linked to this survey.

seenSurveyWaitPeriodInDays.description: Don't show this survey to users who saw any survey in the last x days.

urlMatchType.description:
URL/device matching types: 'regex' (matches regex pattern), 'not_regex' (does not match regex pattern), 'exact' (exact string match), 'is_not' (not exact match), 'icontains' (case-insensitive contains), 'not_icontains' (case-insensitive does not contain).

* `regex` - regex
* `not_regex` - not_regex
* `exact` - exact
* `is_not` - is_not
* `icontains` - icontains
* `not_icontains` - not_icontains

conditions.description: Display and targeting conditions for in-app surveys, such as URL matching, event triggers, device filters, or linked flag variants. Do not use URL, selector, event, device, or linkedFlagVariant conditions for external_survey forms.

enable_iframe_embedding.description: Allows an external_survey form to be embedded in an iframe. Use only when the user explicitly asks for iframe embedding.

enable_partial_responses.description: When at least one question is answered, the response is stored (true). The response is stored when all questions are answered (false).

form_content.description: Optional hosted-form content configuration for external_survey forms. Only include this when the user explicitly asks to customize the hosted form content beyond the standard question flow.

iteration_count.description: For a recurring schedule, this field specifies the number of times the survey should be shown to the user. Use 1 for 'once every X days', higher numbers for multiple repetitions. Works together with iteration_frequency_days to determine the overall survey schedule.

iteration_frequency_days.description: For a recurring schedule, this field specifies the interval in days between each survey instance shown to the user, used alongside iteration_count for precise scheduling.

linked_flag_id.description: Feature flag ID linked to this survey. Use only when the user explicitly wants the survey linked to a feature flag. Resolve the flag ID first, preferably with SQL in v2.

descriptionContentType.description:
Format for the description field.

* `text` - text
* `html` - html

optional.description: Whether respondents may skip this question.

type.description: * `open` - open

descriptionContentType.description:
Format for the description field.

* `text` - text
* `html` - html

link.description: HTTPS or mailto URL for link questions.

optional.description: Whether respondents may skip this question.

type.description: * `link` - link

Continue to the next question in sequence.

* `next_question` - next_question

End the survey.

* `end` - end

Jump to a specific question index.

* `specific_question` - specific_question

responseValues.description: Response-based branching map. Values can be a question index or 'end'.

type.description:
Branch based on the selected or entered response.

* `response_based` - response_based

descriptionContentType.description:
Format for the description field.

* `text` - text
* `html` - html

display.description:
Display format: 'number' shows numeric scale, 'emoji' shows emoji scale.

* `number` - number
* `emoji` - emoji

lowerBoundLabel.description: Label for the lowest rating (e.g., 'Very Poor')

optional.description: Whether respondents may skip this question.

scale.description: Rating scale can be one of 3, 5, or 7

type.description: * `rating` - rating

Continue to the next question in sequence.

* `next_question` - next_question

End the survey.

* `end` - end

Jump to a specific question index.

* `specific_question` - specific_question

responseValues.description: Response-based branching map. Values can be a question index or 'end'.

type.description:
Branch based on the selected or entered response.

* `response_based` - response_based

choices.description: Array of choice options. Choice indices (0, 1, 2, ...) are used for branching logic.

descriptionContentType.description:
Format for the description field.

* `text` - text
* `html` - html

hasOpenChoice.description: Whether the final option should be an open-text choice (for example, 'Other').

optional.description: Whether respondents may skip this question.

shuffleOptions.description: Whether to randomize the order of choices for each respondent.

type.description: * `single_choice` - single_choice

choices.description: Array of choice options. Multiple selections allowed. No branching logic supported.

descriptionContentType.description:
Format for the description field.

* `text` - text
* `html` - html

hasOpenChoice.description: Whether the final option should be an open-text choice (for example, 'Other').

optional.description: Whether respondents may skip this question.

shuffleOptions.description: Whether to randomize the order of choices for each respondent.

type.description: * `multiple_choice` - multiple_choice

questions.description: Complete survey question list. Prefer 1-3 questions unless the user explicitly asks for a longer survey. Use rating questions for NPS/CSAT, open for freeform feedback, and choice questions when the user wants structured answers. Questions can include inline translations on each question.

responses_limit.description: The maximum number of responses before automatically stopping the survey.

schedule.description: Survey scheduling behavior. Omit this to use the default once behavior. Use recurring only when the user explicitly asks for a repeated schedule.

start_date.description: Setting this launches the survey immediately. Leave unset unless the user explicitly asks to launch now.

aggregation_group_type_index.description: Group type index for group-based feature flags.

feature_enrollment.description: Whether this flag has early access feature enrollment enabled. When true, the flag is evaluated against the person property $feature_enrollment/{flag_key}.

groups.description: Release condition groups for the feature flag.

aggregation_group_type_index.description: Group type index for this condition set. None means person-level aggregation.

properties.description: Property conditions for this release condition group.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Operator used to compare the property value.

* `exact` - exact
* `is_not` - is_not
* `icontains` - icontains
* `not_icontains` - not_icontains
* `regex` - regex
* `not_regex` - not_regex
* `gt` - gt
* `gte` - gte
* `lt` - lt
* `lte` - lte

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

value.description: Comparison value for the property filter. Supports strings, numbers, booleans, and arrays.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

value.description: Optional value. Runtime behavior determines whether this is ignored.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Date comparison operator.

* `is_date_exact` - is_date_exact
* `is_date_after` - is_date_after
* `is_date_before` - is_date_before

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

value.description: Date value in ISO format or relative date expression.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Semantic version comparison operator.

* `semver_gt` - semver_gt
* `semver_gte` - semver_gte
* `semver_lt` - semver_lt
* `semver_lte` - semver_lte
* `semver_eq` - semver_eq
* `semver_neq` - semver_neq
* `semver_tilde` - semver_tilde
* `semver_caret` - semver_caret
* `semver_wildcard` - semver_wildcard

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

type.description:
Property filter type. Common values are 'person' and 'cohort'.

* `cohort` - cohort
* `person` - person
* `group` - group

value.description: List of strings to evaluate against.

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Membership operator for cohort properties.

* `in` - in
* `not_in` - not_in

type.description:
Cohort property type required for in/not_in operators.

* `cohort` - cohort

value.description: Cohort comparison value (single or list, depending on usage).

cohort_name.description: Resolved cohort name for cohort-type filters.

group_type_index.description: Group type index when using group-based filters.

key.description: Property key used in this feature flag condition.

operator.description:
Operator for feature flag dependency evaluation.

* `flag_evaluates_to` - flag_evaluates_to

type.description:
Flag property type required for flag dependency checks.

* `flag` - flag

value.description: Value to compare flag evaluation against.

rollout_percentage.description: Rollout percentage for this release condition group.

variant.description: Variant key override for multivariate flags.

variants.description: Variant definitions for multivariate feature flags.

payloads.description: Optional payload values keyed by variant key.

super_groups.description: Additional super condition groups used by experiments.

targeting_flag_filters.description: User targeting rules for in-app surveys. Use only when the user wants the survey shown to a subset of users. Do not use this for external_survey forms.

translations.description: Optional survey-level translations keyed by language code. Use for translated survey name, description, and thank-you message fields. Question text translations belong inside each question's translations object.

type.description: Survey type. Use popover for most in-app surveys, widget for always-available feedback entrypoints, external_survey for hosted forms with a shareable public URL, and api only for headless custom implementations.
